description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 30 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 1 min. His work was mostly in Java (47%), with additional time in Other (36%) and Markdown (17%). The data shows activity across 5 projects.
